publishedAbstract: * Ceph CSI pods always logging the following from `mount_linux.go` ~~~ I0711 05:27:40.082607 1 mount_linux.go:173] Cannot run systemd-run, assuming non-systemd OS I0711 05:27:40.082622 1 mount_linux.go:174] systemd-run failed with: exit status 1 I0711 05:27:40.082630 1 mount_linux.go:175] systemd-run output: System has not been booted with systemd as init system (PID 1). Can't operate. Failed to create bus connection: Host is down ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph CSI pods logging "systemd-run failed with: exit status 1" in an OCS 4.X environment, Why?
